description: Shabana Mahmood was appointed Secretary of State for the Home Department on 5 September 2025. She was previously Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice between 5 July 2024 and 5 September 2025. She was elected as the MP for Birmingham Ladywood in July 2024.

details.body:
Shabana Mahmood was appointed Secretary of State for the Home Department on 5 September 2025.

She was previously Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice between 5 July 2024 and 5 September 2025.

She was elected as the MP for Birmingham Ladywood in July 2024.

image.alt_text: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

available_translations.title: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

details.body:
Shabana Mahmood was appointed Secretary of State for the Home Department on 5 September 2025.

She was previously Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice between 5 July 2024 and 5 September 2025.

She was elected as the MP for Birmingham Ladywood in July 2024.

image.alt_text: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

person.title: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

details.body:
The Secretary of State has overall responsibility for all Home Office business, including:

  • overarching responsibility for the departmental portfolio
  • oversight of the ministerial team
  • Home Office business in Cabinet
  • membership of the National Security Council (NSC)
  • responsibility for public appointments relating to the work of the department
  • oversight of the Security Service

role.title: Secretary of State for the Home Department

role_appointments.title: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP - Secretary of State for the Home Department

details.body:
Shabana Mahmood was appointed Secretary of State for the Home Department on 5 September 2025.

She was previously Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice between 5 July 2024 and 5 September 2025.

She was elected as the MP for Birmingham Ladywood in July 2024.

image.alt_text: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

person.title: The Rt Hon Shabana Mahmood MP

details.body:
• Oversight of all justice portfolios, policy, and Ministry of Justice strategy
  • Oversight of cross-cutting emergency  issues, responses  supported by other  ministers according to  portfolio
  • Oversight of international business and future relations with the EU 
  • MOJ support for the Union
  • Resourcing of the department 
  • Functions of the Lord Chancellor 
  • Judicial policy including pay, pensions and  diversity (these and  other operational  decisions affecting the  judiciary are reserved to the Lord Chancellor)

role.title: Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice
